name: Vamsi Koka
recommendation: Aryant is a highly motivated software professional with strong skills in development and UI/UX. He is creative, detail-oriented, and a quick learner who takes ownership of his work. He is a strong team player with good communication and problem-solving abilities, consistently delivers quality results, and shows a strong commitment to continuous improvement. He is highly recommended and would be a valuable asset to any organization.

name: Mohan Verma
recommendation: Aryant worked as an intern for Auris Advisory and has put valuable efforts into the improvement of a live Android application of the firm. He has shown good dedication and application during his work. I recommend him for his Android skills and keenness to learn more.

name: Dr. Sachin Sidhra
recommendation: Aryant is one enthusiastic soul. He needs no pushing to be active in the class, a confident presenter and communicator. He carries knowledge across multiple fields and is a very open and humble person to talk to. I wish him all the best for all his projects and endeavors.
